name: newer-major-than-spoken
note: a major newer than any spoken is refused, not assumed back-compatible

name: major-no-longer-spoken
note: the dual-running window for major 1 has closed — the build stopped speaking it

name: gap-major-between-spoken
note: major 2 is not in the speaks set even though it is below current

name: speaks-nothing
note: a build that speaks no major reads nothing

name: malformed-missing-minor
note: not a major.minor string — never guess the major
